model_choice_rationale: RF+isotonic calibration chosen over LR for low prevalence (2.6%). AUC 0.8635→0.8567 with 53→20 features (flat performance). LR AUC=0.8002/AUPRC=0.1458 — unusable (precision<17% until t=0.90).
pipeline_gate_rationale: Global routing gate: scores above 0.35 escalate to next pipeline step
recommended_threshold_criterion: User-selected: prec=0.373, recall=0.438, f1=0.403, flags=3.0%. Feature count comparison (C=0.10→53 feats AUC=0.8635 vs C=0.01→20 feats AUC=0.8567) showed flat performance; parsimonious model selected.
leakage_removed: heq010 / heq020 (self-reported hep B diagnosis & treatment)
heq030 / heq040 (self-reported hep C diagnosis & treatment)
selection_rationale: L1 C=0.01 on 77 roadmap features → 20 survivors → dedup → 20
notes: 0 rows dropped (target has no NaN). kiq010 100%-precision cross-tab was removed by dedup at C=0.10; not a survivor at C=0.01.
